Footer.tagline: MoonPlants helps you keep your indoor plants healthy and happy. Monitor soil moisture, temperature, and light — all in one place!

HeroSection.subtitle: Welcome to MoonPlants, your ultimate companion for effortless plant care. Monitor soil moisture, temperature, and light levels in real-time, and let our AI-powered system guide you with tailored watering recommendations. Keep your plants thriving with ease!

AboutSection.title: About Us
AboutSection.feature1Desc: Stay informed with live updates on your plant's soil moisture, air humidity, temperature, and light levels
AboutSection.feature2Desc: Get precise, AI-driven advice on when to water your plants to ensure they stay healthy and vibrant
AboutSection.feature3Desc: Our neural networks analyze your plant data to predict future needs, helping you plan care with confidence

FaqSection.title: FAQ
FaqSection.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Learn more about how MoonPlants works and how it can transform your plant care routine.
FaqSection.a1: MoonPlants uses sensors to collect real-time data on your plants' environment. This data is sent to our platform, where AI analyzes it to provide personalized care recommendations.
FaqSection.q2: What types of plants can I monitor?
FaqSection.a2: You can monitor a wide variety of houseplants and garden plants. MoonPlants supports any plant that can use a sensor device for tracking environmental conditions.
FaqSection.q3: Do I need technical skills to use MoonPlants?
FaqSection.a3: No, MoonPlants is designed for everyone. The setup is simple, and our platform guides you through every step.
FaqSection.a4: Our AI-powered predictions are highly accurate, but results may vary depending on plant type, sensor placement, and data quality.

FeedbackSection.title: We'd Love to Hear from You!
FeedbackSection.subtitle: Your feedback helps us grow. Share your thoughts, suggestions, or experiences to help us improve MoonPlants for everyone
FeedbackSection.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you love or how we can improve!

Auth.signUpDescription: Fill in the fields below to get started
Auth.passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters

ProfilePage.title: My Plants
ProfilePage.subtitle: Monitor moisture, temperature and light — all in one place.

PlantDetail.loginRequired: Please sign in to your account
PlantDetail.notFoundDesc: It may have been deleted or you don't have access to it.
PlantDetail.noMeasurementsDesc: Data will appear here once the device sends its first readings.
PlantDetail.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. All measurements and plant data will be permanently deleted.

MLPredictions.title: AI Care Forecast
MLPredictions.description: LSTM neural network analysis of moisture trends and environmental stress.
MLPredictions.noData: Not enough data for AI analysis yet. Please wait for more measurements.

PlantsSection.title: Your plants
PlantsSection.emptyDesc: Start with your first plant — add it and connect it to a device.
PlantsSection.emptyLong: Add your first plant to start monitoring and receive AI recommendations.

DevicesSection.title: Your devices
DevicesSection.emptyDesc: Add a controller to collect sensor data.
DevicesSection.emptyLong: Connect a MoonPlants controller to start receiving telemetry from your plants.
DevicesSection.disconnectConfirmDesc: This will disconnect the controller from your account. All plants will remain, but won't receive data until you connect them to another device.

LastMeasurements.title: Latest measurements
LastMeasurements.noData: Data will appear once the sensor makes its first reading.

AddPlantForm.modalSubtitle: Fill in the details and optionally connect to a controller
AddPlantForm.channelOccupied: This channel is already occupied by another plant

ClaimDevice.modalSubtitle: Enter device credentials or scan the QR label
ClaimDevice.claimCodeError: Code must be at least 16 characters
ClaimDevice.scanHint: Point at the QR code on the device label

SwapChannels.title: Swap Channels
SwapChannels.desc: Select two plants on this device to swap their channels.

ConnectPlant.title: Connect plant
ConnectPlant.desc: Select one of your disconnected plants and a free channel on this device.
